title: George Herald office closed on public holiday
description: GEORGE NEWS - The George Herald office in...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The George Herald office in Ring Road, George Industria, will be closed on the public holiday next Friday, 9 August (Women's Day).


> But don't panic - you won't have to go without your beloved local paper! In fact, George Herald will be available at all the usual outlets one day earlier than usual, on Wednesday 7 August.


So when Women's Day comes round, relax, sit back and take your time browsing through George Herald.

Or go online and follow us on www.georgeherald.com, facebook, X (twitter), Instagram, TikTok and YouTube.

On Monday 12 August it is business as usual, office hours are 08:00 till 16:30. Contact us at 044 874 2424.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
